subcodes.first_line: Everything is from God, both good and evil... Everything in existence is good, and only the lack of goodness make a thing evil. The being is created good
subcodes.subjects: @free will and predestination; fate, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @light and darkness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @nonexistence of evil; relativity of good and evil
